config.name: meraki_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: meraki_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:23:58.187042

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local TIMESTAMP_PATTERN = "^%d+$"

-- Cached functions for performance
local tonumber = tonumber
local type = type
local os_time = os.time

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local table
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        device = {}, -- Initialize nested table early
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Cisco Meraki",
                vendor_name = "Cisco"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp transformation with validation
    local ts = record.timestamp
    if ts then
        if type(ts) == "string" and ts:match(TIMESTAMP_PATTERN) then
            output.time = tonumber(ts)
        elseif type(ts) == "number" then
            output.time = ts
        else
            output.time = os_time() * 1000 -- Fallback to current time
        end
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Hostname transformation with validation
    local hostname = record.hostname
    if hostname and type(hostname) == "string" then
        output.device.hostname = hostname
    end

    -- Operation type transformation
    local op = record.op
    if op and type(op) == "string" then
        output.activity_name = op
        -- Map common Meraki operations to OCSF activity types
        local activity_map = {
            connect = "network.connect",
            disconnect = "network.disconnect",
            auth = "network.authenticate",
            dhcp = "network.dhcp"
        }
        output.activity_name = activity_map[op:lower()] or op
    end

    -- Additional field enrichment
    if record.src_ip then
        output.src = {ip = record.src_ip}
    end
    
    if record.dst_ip then
        output.dst = {ip = record.dst_ip}
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.time or not output.class_uid then
        return nil, "Missing required OCSF fields"
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output.metadata.processing = {
        timestamp = os_time() * 1000,
        parser_version = "1.0.0"
    }

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
